_comment:
Hand-curated overrides for CMU 0.7b. Format matches CMU: space-separated ARPAbet phonemes with stress digits 0/1/2. Three classes of fixes:
  (1) Outright transcription errors (typology, intention).
  (2) Missing words that appear in Pattison's worksheets (pretention, jezebel, fibber, twerp).
  (3) Stress-digit fixes for compound or affixed endings — CMU often marks the second component as unstressed when songwriters/Pattison treat it as secondary-stressed (suburb, iceberg, egomaniac, kleptomaniac).
  (4) Syllabification quirks where CMU inserts a schwa that shouldn't be there (solely).
typology: T AY2 P AA1 L AH0 JH IY0
intention: IH0 N T EH1 N SH AH0 N
pretention: P R IY0 T EH1 N SH AH0 N
jezebel: JH EH1 Z AH0 B EH2 L
egomaniac: IY2 G OW0 M EY1 N IY0 AE2 K
kleptomaniac: K L EH2 P T AH0 M EY1 N IY0 AE2 K
